title: Killer Rabbit
description: The Killer Rabbit mod is a thrilling addition to the Minecraft experience, introducing the notorious Killer Rabbit
body: Deep within the bowels of the laboratory, you'll encounter these menacing creatures, the result of unholy experiments gone awry. Armed with enhanced agility, ferocious strength, and a hunger for destruction, the Killer Rabbit is a formidable adversary that will keep even the most seasoned players on their toes.
